##LOCALITY=Daoping mine, Guangxi, China
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Spherical aggregates of pale green acicular crystals, associated with colorless cerussite, anglesite, and blue linarite R120094.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been made only by X-ray diffraction

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
